title: gahnia procera
intro: Gahnia procera, also known as the Giant Sedge or Black Needle Rush, is a type of perennial sedge native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gahnia procera include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and soothe skin irritations. Gahnia procera can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
